title: CPL - QUALIFIER
summary: official preliminary stage of the Cyber Premier League (CPL), designed to identify and advance top cybersecurity talent into the main competition. This stage evaluates participants through practical, scenario-based challenges covering real-world offensive and defensive security disciplines.

title: WEEKLY CTF - 25-07-2025
summary: A suspicious Android APK has surfaced. It looks simple on the outside—but you know better. Can you reverse it, unlock its secrets, and find the hidden flag?

title: WEEKLY CTF - 18-07-2025
summary: A public vulnerability has been disclosed — and a web application in the wild is still running the affected version. Can you weaponize the exploit and escalate your access?
